utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan includes physical_health and mental_health with providers, monthly costs, coverage details, plus a total health monthly cost. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan includes provider, monthly cost, and coverage details (limits and specifics). Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan includes provider, monthly cost, and coverage details. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan includes professional_liability with monthly cost and coverage details. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan includes monthly_cost and annual_cost, plus extra fields. Fully specified for the requirement.
All 5 items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific providers: InsurePlus Standard Plan for physical health, InsurePlus Standard Plan for mental health, InsurePlus Standard Coverage for property, and InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel. Cross-referencing with ground-truth ratings: Physical health InsurePlus Standard Plan rating is 10 under primary_health_coverage.physical_health; Mental health InsurePlus Standard Plan rating is 7 under primary_health_coverage.mental_health; Property InsurePlus Standard Coverage rating is 10 under property_protection.home_content; Travel InsurePlus Standard Plan rating is 10 under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance. No specific rated option is provided for the professional liability service, so it is not included.
